name: Short Slide Down
description: Each word drops in from above and pushes the line stack downward — the line never moves; instead each new word arrives at the top of the stack and shoves what's already there. Useful for stacked vertical text where reveal order is meaningful.
notes: Layout-aware: words must be stacked vertically (one per line), not horizontal. Implementer wraps each word in a block-display container so they push the next word down as they enter.
